channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: How FinOps Supports Responsible and Sustainable AI Development
item.description: Artificial Intelligence is accelerating at a breathtaking pace—but so are its costs and environmental implications. Training large models, running inference at scale, and storing vast datasets all...

item.title: Stop Flickering UIs: Handle Subdomains with Next.js Edge Middleware ⚡
item.description: The Challenge of Dynamic Subdomains When scaling a professional B2B SaaS platform at Smart Tech Devs, providing clients with their own custom subdomains (e.g., acme.smarttechdevs.in) is a premium...

item.title: BPMN as config: one vocabulary runs the model, the runtime, and the analytics
item.description: BPMN 2.0 lets you put arbitrary attributes in your own namespace on any element. The established BPM runtimes — Camunda and Flowable — both preserve those attributes through parsing and make them...

item.title: Fonctionnement d’une blockchain - Étape 5/8 : Lien “maillon - maillon”
item.description: Chaque bloc pointe (par hash) vers le bloc précédent. Ce chaînage rend l’historique difficile à falsifier car modifier un ancien bloc casserait tous les hashes suivants. Qu’est-ce qu’un hash ? Un...

item.title: Proofdesk — The IDE for Open-Source Math Textbook Publishing
item.description: github proofdesk Inspiration Math professors who write open-source textbooks are stuck in a painful loop: edit XML in a text editor → open a terminal → run a Docker build that takes 15 minutes →...

item.title: Learning Artificial Intelligence on Microsoft Azure: A Beginner’s Roadmap
item.description: Artificial Intelligence isn’t a distant frontier anymore—it’s infrastructure. And if cloud is the backbone of modern systems, then AI is the intelligence layer riding on top of it. Platforms like...

item.title: Building MCP Servers in Python: a production primer for 2026
item.description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) went from "Anthropic side project" to industry standard in eighteen months. As of March 2026, MCP SDKs are pulling 97 million monthly downloads. Every serious...

item.title: So You Vibe Coded an App. But Can It Survive Real Users?
item.description: Let me be upfront — I'm not here to bash Vibe Coding. I've written about using AI to build, and I stand by it. But there's a conversation we're not having enough in this community, and it's this:...

item.title: Analysis internal data safely with Hermes agent and OneQuery
item.description: Personal Agents, such as Hermes Agent and OpenClaw, are powerful. They can perform deep analysis on internal data, and the results can be great. But there are safety issues. An agent can read real...

item.title: I Built a Local AI VRAM Calculator & GPU Planner (Beta)
item.description: I added a new tool to the site: the Local AI VRAM Calculator & GPU Planner (Beta). This came out of a problem I kept running into while experimenting with local models. It is surprisingly easy to...

item.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
item.description: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.

item.title: The Iranian women Trump ‘saved’ from execution are simultaneously real and AI-manipulated
item.description: On Wednesday, President Donald Trump claimed to have secured the release of eight Iranian women condemned to execution for protesting the regime. Only the night before, he had posted on Truth...

item.title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
item.description: Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.

item.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
item.description: Google has introduced a host of new automated functions into Workspace, all of which are driven by Workspace Intelligence, its new AI system.

item.title: Elon Musk admits that millions of Tesla vehicles won’t get unsupervised FSD
item.description: Tesla vehicles with the company's Hardware 3 (HW3) computer actually won't receive unsupervised Full Self-Driving (FSD), CEO Elon Musk said on Wednesday's Q1 2026 earnings call. Approximately 4...

item.title: Hands on with X’s new AI-powered custom feeds
item.description: X's AI-powered custom timelines are replacing Communities, with Grok-curated feeds...and new ad slots.

item.title: Sam Altman’s Orb Company Promoted a Bruno Mars Partnership That Doesn't Exist
item.description: “To be clear, we were never approached … nor were we in any discussions regarding a partnership or tour access,” a spokesperson for the artist tells WIRED.

item.title: X is going to let Grok curate your timeline
item.description: X is putting its AI chatbot, Grok, in charge of your timeline. In an announcement on Wednesday, X product head Nikita Bier says Premium subscribers on iOS can get early access to a feature that...

item.title: Tesla’s revenue rises again as it prepares for more AI and robotics
item.description: Tesla released its 2026 first-quarter financial earnings today, providing another look at the progress of Elon Musk's $1 trillion bet to transform his company into a leader of AI and robotics....

item.title: AI failure could trigger the next financial crisis, warns Elizabeth Warren
item.description: "I know a bubble when I see one." That's what Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), who led the push to create a new consumer financial regulator in the wake of the 2008 recession, told a crowd at a...

item.title: OpenAI now lets teams make custom bots that can do work on their own
item.description: OpenAI is giving users of its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans access to cloud-based "workspace" agents available in ChatGPT that can perform business tasks. In its blog post, OpenAI...

item.title: Alexis Ohanian shocks Washington with pro-immigration remarks
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge readers about tech politics, political tech, and how they're muddying the waters of Washington, DC. My birthday is this week, and if you're...

item.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
item.description: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

item.title: Microsoft issues emergency update for macOS and Linux ASP.NET threat
item.description: When authentication fails, things can go very, very wrong.

item.title: Former MrBeast exec sues over ‘years’ of alleged harassment
item.description: A former employee of Jimmy "MrBeast" Donaldson has filed a lawsuit alleging that she faced "intentional infliction of emotional distress" from harassment at the YouTuber's production company, was...

item.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
item.description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

item.title: 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
item.description: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.

item.title: Ember’s self-heating smart mug is more than $50 off ahead of Mother’s Day
item.description: Coffee is what gets many of us through the workday, and a proper smart mug can keep it hot for hours so you can maintain your focus without constantly getting up to reheat your cup. Thankfully, if...

item.title: Malicious KICS Docker Images and VS Code Extensions Hit Checkmarx Supply Chain
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of malicious images pushed to the official "checkmarx/kics" Docker Hub repository. In an alert published today, software supply chain security company Socket...

item.title: Self-Propagating Supply Chain Worm Hijacks npm Packages to Steal Developer Tokens
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens. The...
